items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
▪️LE 5 À 7▪️
The hot-to-trot shoulder bag YSL finally has!!️ When I first saw it, I thought the name was so special. Inspired by the niche film "Cléo from 5 to 7", it tells the story of the 5-7 PM gap between leaving work and getting home, and how the protagonist Cléo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, looking structured yet not too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives off a unique aura that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Model: 657228
Size: 24.5x16x6cm
